title: Smart Input Validation: UI Gets an Upgrade

topics.title: Cross-Platform CLI Improvements
topics.summary: Merged PR #2257 introduces a shared cross-platform npm process resolver to enhance the Windows connector authentication flow. This change avoids shell-based npm execution and resolves DEP0190 warnings, ensuring consistent behavior across platforms while maintaining interactive execution.

topics.title: Design System Documentation
topics.summary: Merged PR #2252 adds comprehensive design system guidelines to the storybook documentation. This includes sections on colors and typography, and moves theme configurations to improve accessibility within the documentation, enhancing the overall design consistency for developers.

topics.title: Enhanced Input Validation
topics.summary: Merged PR #2176 introduces semver range filtering and improved error handling in the UI. The update replaces traditional error messages with inline icons to indicate error states, enhancing user experience and clarity during input validation.

topics.title: Bug Fix for Windows CLI
topics.summary: Closed Issue #2216 addresses a bug in the npmx-connector that emitted a Node.js DEP0190 deprecation warning during npm authentication checks. This issue highlighted security vulnerabilities related to shell execution, prompting necessary fixes in the CLI.

topics.title: Community Engagement on Bluesky
topics.summary: Recent posts on Bluesky highlight community engagement with npmx.dev. Contributors express excitement about their involvement, showcasing the collaborative spirit and support within the community, which is vital for ongoing development and feedback.
